title: Medusa
description: Medusa is a medieval based mod with new dimensions, biomes, ores, weapons, tools, armors etc. that increases the difficulty and time you can enjoy your world!
body:
Medusa is mainly focused on medieval and weapon aspects of the game with new dimensions, armors, ores, weapons, animals, structures and enemies.

Some main inclusions are:
Medieval settlements
Harder enemies
More structures overall
New loot tables
Pillager encampments
New bosses
New biomes
Better caves and such
Improved nether with better biomes
Added some unused vanilla mobs

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Swaix

Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/swaix

Support Server: https://discord.gg/FwC2c6u3Jt
